title: Perplexity plans IPO in 2028 regardless of what happens to Anthropic or OpenAI, CEO tells CNBC
summary_full: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.
summary_public: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.
